question.text: What is the minimum net worth requirement for an Asset Management Company (AMC) of a mutual fund at all times?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The AMC of a MF must have a net worth of at least Rs 50 Crores at all times. **The Trap:** Rs 150 crores is the enhanced net worth when the sponsor does not meet standard track record conditions. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This is a continuous requirement - AMC must maintain this at ALL times, not just at registration.
